title: Bayan cards: tracking column + clock strip
changes: Bayan number promoted from a faded chip to a monospace pill (#42) sitting directly under the time node — forms a twin-anchor tracking column in the right gutter
نُشر / نُفّذ timestamps moved from an orphaned footer into mini clock boxes next to the card title (dual instrument panel layout)
Fixed RTL direction bug where 'نُشر' and 'نُفّذ' labels were appearing after their values instead of before
Clock strip stacks under the title on mobile so long Arabic target names are not crushed
Other tabs (sirens, enemy, iran, videos, allies) untouched — change is opt-in via new refNum/meta config fields on createTimelineCard

title: Fix: empty bayan titles across all days
changes: Resolved 117 bayans with empty target fields across 26 report days (Mar 3 → Mar 30)
Rewrote categorize.py extract_target() with priority-ordered location patterns instead of a single regex

Handles direct-object strikes (قاعدة/ثكنة/موقع/مقرّ/مصفاة/مجمّع/شركة/مستوطنة), direction markers (باتجاه/نحو/فوق/محيط), cardinal + landmark (شرق معتقل/شمال مشروع), between-villages, air defense, multi-settlement lists, و-suffixed verbs (استهدفها/استهدفهما), and more
Preamble stripper improved to drop 'ردًّا على العدوان...' and weekday/time noise without leaving orphaned connectives
Tatweel (ـ) characters now normalized so elongated names like 'قــــاعدة عيــن شيمر' match

title: Add list view with sorting
changes: New toggle at top of homepage: 📅 Calendar | 📋 List (calendar remains default)
List view shows each report as a row with date, day name, colored stat pills, keyword preview, and total badge
Sort dropdown: date, total, bayanat, sirens, enemy, iran, videos — with asc/desc direction toggle
Summary strip: report count, total events, daily average
Whole row is clickable → opens the report
View preference saved in localStorage

title: UI: swap header buttons + clickable title
changes: Swapped positions of home button and theme toggle in report header
Home button (الرئيسية) now on the left, theme toggle (sun/moon) now on the right
Made page title 'الإعلام الحربي — التغطية الإخبارية' clickable → navigates home

title: Fix: empty bayan titles + day cutoff at 13:00
changes: Fixed extract_target regex: narrow weapon-prefix terminator list caused empty titles when bayan used بالصواريخ الموجّهة (bayan 39 on Mar 26 and others)
Extended terminators to cover بالصواريخ, بصواريخ, بمسيّرات, بسلاح, برشقة, بالمدفعية, بقذيفة, برشّاش
Broadened object-prefix strip for dual-form دبّابتَي/دبّابتين with قرب/قبالة prepositions
Fixed silent truncation: Telegram fetch limit was 200, cut busy days mid-afternoon — bumped to 2000
Re-fetched 18 truncated days (Feb 28, Mar 7/10/11/13/14/17-27, 29)
Regenerated all 40 data files — Mar 26 alone: 40→94 bayanat, 33→66 sirens, coverage 13:30→22:10
Rebuilt index.html reportStats from fresh data

title: Report: Apr 9 (escalation resumes)
changes: Added Apr 9 report: 3 bayanat, 2 sirens, 1 enemy report
Hezbollah resumes operations citing Israeli ceasefire violation
Targets: Manara settlement (rocket salvo), Tayba (Namera vehicle + Israeli force)
Fixed categorize.py shadda regex (السّاعة) for opTime + target extraction

title: Reports: Feb 28 - Mar 6
changes: Added 7 reports covering the war's opening days (Feb 28 - Mar 6)
Feb 28-Mar 1: Pre-Hezbollah strike (Iran+sirens, 181 and 154 events)
Mar 2: First Hezbollah strike, Mar 3: 13 bayanat day, Mar 5: 9 bayanat + Radwan assault
Total coverage: 40 days (Feb 28 - Apr 8)

title: Bug fixes + README
changes: Fix: reports stuck on loading screen (missing closing brace in renderReport)
Fix: weapon chart always showing 'أخرى' (stale .bayan-details selector → .weapon-chip)
Fix: empty hourly operations chart (stale .t-val selector → .node-time)
Added project README.md

title: Reports: March 7-20
changes: Added 14 historical reports: March 7-20 (1,664 total events across two weeks)
Total coverage now spans 33 days (March 7 - April 8)
Notable: Mar 11 had 74 sirens (highest single-day), Mar 12 had 23 Iran entries

title: Reports: March 21-27
changes: Added 7 historical reports: March 21-27 (788 total events across the week)
Total coverage now spans 19 days (March 21 - April 8)

title: Reports: March 28-30
changes: Added 3 historical reports: March 28 (123 events), March 29 (128 events), March 30 (103 events)
Total coverage now spans 12 days (March 28 - April 8)

title: Report: April 8
changes: Day 9 report: IRGC True Promise 4 Wave 100 (25+ strategic targets), Hezbollah political statements, 6 siren alerts (Haifa/Beer Sheva/Tel Aviv), Golani ambush at Taybeh, 3 operation videos, Iraq/Yemen/Lebanon ally statements

title: Search Deep-Link
changes: Clicking a search result scrolls to the exact card in the report
Gold border highlight on target card for 3 seconds
URL params: ?tab=&idx=&q= for direct deep-linking

title: Global Spotlight Search
changes: Press / or Ctrl+K to open search from any page
Searches across all 8+ daily reports instantly
Category filter pills (بيانات, صفارات, إعلام, إيران, فيديو, حلفاء)
Keyboard navigation: arrow keys + Enter to open result
Arabic normalization + English aliases (merkava, haifa, drone...)
Recent searches saved as suggestion chips

title: Proper Semver + Git Tags
changes: Changelog uses semver 1.0.0 through 1.0.N
Git tags created for all milestones (v1.0.0 to v1.0.41)
Cache-busting on changelog.json fetch

title: Clickable Changelog Modal
changes: Version badge in footer opens changelog modal
Changelog data stored in changelog.json
Auto-increment patch version on every git push

title: Versioning + LTR Dates
changes: Added visible version to all footers
LTR direction for calendar grid, month nav, day nav, timeline nodes
Pre-push git hook auto-increments patch number

title: Timeline Redesign (Option C v2)
changes: Unified timeline card design for all 6 tabs
Operation time in timeline nodes instead of statement numbers
Color-coded cards: purple (settlement), orange (tank), blue (deep strike)
Red hit indicator on nodes for confirmed strikes
Phase dividers show operation count
Subtle card tint matching operation type

title: Token Optimization
changes: Python categorizer script replaces LLM agent for message categorization
Report generation cost: ~230k tokens down to ~11k (97% reduction)

title: SPA Architecture
changes: Migrated from per-day HTML files to single-page app (report.html + app.js + styles.css)
JSON data files replace generated HTML (data/*.json)
One rendering engine for all reports — no more duplicated CSS/JS
Updated index.html links and report-enhancements.js for SPA URLs

title: Full Text Format Fix
changes: Fixed full text display across all reports (Apr 1-7)
JS object + DOM textContent approach preserves Arabic line breaks
Full bayan text includes bismillah, Quran verses, date, hashtags

title: Landing Page + Polish
changes: Custom domain (harbi-reports.com)
Mobile responsiveness: smaller text, tighter gaps, no overflow
Global smart search on landing page with Arabic normalization
Auto-categorization dashboards for enemy + Iran tabs

title: Maps + Enhancements
changes: Shared report-enhancements.js with auto-categorization dashboards
Hero summary, prev/next day navigation, operations map
Fullscreen button on all maps, dark/light tile swap
Siren categorization: region bars, type pills, timeline, filters

title: Interactive Features
changes: Interactive siren map with Leaflet (hover, click, popups)
Bayanat categorization dashboard
Dark/light theme toggle
Calendar landing page with heatmap and tooltips

title: Initial Release
changes: First reports: Apr 6-7, 2026
6-tab layout: bayanat, sirens, enemy media, Iran, videos, allies
Full text toggle on every card
Smart search with Arabic normalization + English aliases
